Educational and informational use only. This database is not medical advice and does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent disease.

For high blood pressure, diabetes, kidney disease/stones, cancer, PCOS, erectile dysfunction, anxiety, pregnancy/nursing, or medication use, members should consult a licensed clinician before using herbs, vitamins, or minerals.
Avoid disease-treatment claims in public marketing. Use phrases such as “supports wellness,” “traditional use,” “educational reference,” and “ask your healthcare professional.”
